meaning: n.点头示意,招手示意,小河
examples: Once the dust had settled Beck defended his decision.
Another man, Simon Beck, was also ill, and he had a serious pain in his back.
SPD chairman Kurt Beck had told Henrico Frank he would help him.
Your pal, Glen Beck, for example, appeals mainly to people over the age of 55.
Beck's Futures set out last year to be a rival for the Turner prize.
